query:
SELECT 
  f.id,
  f.leadId,
  f.corretorId,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  f.status,
  l.nome as leadNome,
  DATE(f.dataFollowUp) as data_followup,
  TIME(f.dataFollowUp) as hora_followup,
  CURDATE() as data_hoje,
  NOW() as agora_utc,
  CASE 
    WHEN DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = CURDATE() THEN 'HOJE'
    WHEN DATE(f.dataFollowUp) < CURDATE() THEN 'ATRASADO'
    ELSE 'FUTURO'
  END as situacao
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE f.corretorId = 17
  AND f.status = 'pendente'
ORDER BY f.dataFollowUp ASC;

SELECT

  f.leadId,
  f.corretorId,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  f.status,
  l.nome as leadNome,
  DATE(f.dataFollowUp) as data_followup,
  TIME(f.dataFollowUp) as hora_followup,
  CURDATE() as data_hoje,
  NOW() as agora_utc,
  CASE 
    WHEN DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = CURDATE() THEN 'HOJE'
    WHEN DATE(f.dataFollowUp) < CURDATE() THEN 'ATRASADO'
    ELSE 'FUTURO'
  END as situacao
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE f.corretorId = 17
  AND f.status = 'pendente'
ORDER BY f.dataFollowUp ASC;
